content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途
人们因他的强大恐惧他、崇拜他，因他的残酷憎恨他，唾弃他，更因他的失败嘲讽他、放逐他。
但弱者的聒噪毫无意义，巨人的目光只为强者停留。
于荒芜的流亡之海，他将自身性命作为赌注，踏上寻求绝对力量的征程。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST："Goliath Ep: The Reckoning" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST："Goliath Ep: The Reckoning"
They feared his strength. Worshipped it.  
They hated his cruelty. Cursed his name.  
And when he fell, they crowned him failure, Just another exile to be erased from history.  

But the clamor of cowards means nothing.  
The giant’s gaze lingers only on power.  
Now, exiled to a wasteland of forgotten tides,  
he gambles his last breath—  
not for vengeance, not for glory,  
but for the one thing worth bleeding for:  
dominion absolute.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：戈利亚EP·踏上新的征途
